title: Station Stop Shops
body:
Station-Stops have been a major boon to the Monogon working families for so long now that Monogon has to include us in voting rights..

We weren’t the first to come up with the virtual delivery system. Our timing optimization of order to delivery by letting all employees A. use Monogon work credits and B. let them purchase what they’d like while at work then deliver items by the time they’re done for the day.. Has proven to be very successful.

Bandit
